programme.desc: Following Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree as they restore a French chateau that has stood empty for 40 years

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking at Christmas
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jamie Oliver gets creative and makes a pie that embraces whatever remains from the Christmas dinner. Melting down all the leftover bits and pieces from the cheeseboard, he creates the simplest retro fondue we can make in minutes. And smashing up the leftover mince pies and Christmas pudding, the chef rolls up a treat with his 'anything goes' strudel

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas
programme.desc: An advent calendar competition and a guide to making a crochet garland for a fantastic alternative to tinsel. Plus, a craft maker turns forgotten textiles into decorative art. Kirstie Allsopp hosts

programme.title: Luxury Christmas for Less
programme.desc: Sabrina Grant and Helen Skelton speak to former supermarket insiders and uncover what the stores know about people's tastes and shopping habits - and reveal how consumers can use that knowledge to get a brilliant Christmas at bargain prices. Retail psychologists explain the covert role of party food in getting customers to spend more than they need to, and why they are wasting money on champagne when they could buy just as good fizz for half the price

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: Best Bits
programme.desc: The second of two highlights programmes celebrating the show's 10th anniversary features the stories of popular contestants Val and Liam. Featuring a homage to the nation's favourite squirrel, a look into the mystery that surrounds the curse of the Star Baker, and the history of the Hollywood handshake

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers
programme.desc: In London, Nastassja makes a Noah's ark-themed cake for a namesake one year old, while Molly's creates a giant butterfly cake for a birthday surprise

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Alison Murrie hosts the first meal in South Yorkshire, hoping to impress her guests with a traditional menu. However, her starter of tomatoes stuffed with liver provokes one diner to make a revelation that leaves everybody surprised and the hostess tries to get the night back on track with party games

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Motorbike enthusiast Toni Morgan hosts the second party in South Yorkshire, hoping to impress with a selection of unfamiliar dishes, and the diners are given a chance to explore their shaven-headed host's softer side. However, the evening ends on a shocking note with a trip to A&E

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition from South Yorkshire reaches the midway point and it's the turn of football-mad sales manager Mark Hannigan. He's extremely confident of his prospects but, having taken too many shortcuts with the preparation of the food, he hopes that a surprise celebrity visit will help his chances of success

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Gary Holden hosts the penultimate dinner party in South Yorkshire, cooking a complicated menu from scratch and taking note of everyone's likes and dislikes to make sure he wins extra points. However, his non-alcoholic welcome drink does not go down well and Mark is looking for revenge after being on the receiving end of criticism

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kerry Lloyd hosts the final dinner party in South Yorkshire, preparing a feast of classic dishes aimed at filling her guests' stomachs. However, her chances of claiming the £1,000 prize are jeopardised when she burns the starter and the dumplings go awry, leaving her relying on charm and wit to win over the diners before the victor is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Gary Fitzpatrick and Shahine Korimbocus want a holiday home in the tranquil Limousin area of France where they can enjoy an outdoor lifestyle with their 20-month-old twins Charlie and Catherine, and Gary's son Dominic. Brought up with French culture in Mauritius, Shahine wants the children to share her enjoyment of it, and to pick up the language. With a budget of £88,000, Scarlette Douglas sets out to help the family find their perfect house

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: After becoming foster parents to three young children, Jo Danson and her husband Bill decided a holiday home would be the perfect way for everyone to spend quality time together. Working within a budget of £65,000, Jasmine Harman shows Jo five suitable properties in the Orihuela Costa region of Spain

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Grove Barn B&B in Denton, Norfolk, where owners Steph and Alan Flight hope that their approach to cleanliness will lead to good feedback from their guests

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: New owners Anna and Philipp slowly discover they may have taken on more than they bargained for, while Johnny and Ashley aim to make it the year their chateau starts making money

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra becomes jealous of a waitress who catches Ray's eye. Although the situation is perfectly innocent, the couple soon blow everything out of all proportion

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank has some anecdotes published in a magazine, sowing the seeds of grand writing ambitions. He approaches Ray's editor about becoming a columnist, but finds his way with words leaves a lot to be desired. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef takes on one of his toughest challenges yet, J Willy's Bar and Grille in South Bend, Indiana, which has amassed debts of more than $1million. On finding an inexperienced chef serving food from both the freezer and tins, together with service that reduces one customer to tears, Gordon Ramsay orders an overnight deep-clean of the premises and designs a menu to inspire the kitchen staff

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to the upmarket quarter of Hollywood to help the owner of failing health-food restaurant Sante La Brea. As well as struggling to control his disrespectful staff, the proprietor receives a surprise visit from the police at the height of dinner service

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas
programme.desc: Phil Spencer pays a visit as festive crafters compete in a food challenge, trying to impress the judge with their tasty treats in a winner takes all crafting showdown

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Following Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree as they restore a French chateau that has stood empty for 40 years

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes 45-year-old twice-divorced Nicola, who is hoping one of the six naked men behind the screens has what it takes to be husband number three. The second of this episode's contestants is Mark from London, who has Crohn's disease and hopes to regain some body confidence on the show

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking at Christmas
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jamie Oliver gets creative and makes a pie that embraces whatever remains from the Christmas dinner. Melting down all the leftover bits and pieces from the cheeseboard, he creates the simplest retro fondue we can make in minutes. And smashing up the leftover mince pies and Christmas pudding, the chef rolls up a treat with his 'anything goes' strudel

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty hosts a Christmas party at his farm, and the team investigates the secrets behind the food that will be on people's tables over the holiday period. Amanda Byram exposes the surprising truth about turkey crowns, Kate Quilton shares the trick to making the ultimate Christmas cake, Briony Williams investigates the classic starter of prawn cocktail, and Matt Tebbutt finds out just how they get the cranberries into fruity cheese

programme.title: Jo Brand's How to Stay Sane in a Mad World
programme.desc: The comedian embarks on an alphabetic romp as she reveals the most fun, creative and Covid-friendly ways to remain level-headed during the pandemic. From health to horticulture, QR codes to UV rays, and hibernation to isolation, this A-Z guide is brimming with expert advice to keep viewers fighting fit and mentally strong. Along with a host of famous faces, Jo has tips, quips and tonnes of takeout to make surviving the pandemic as easy as ABC

programme.title: World Chase Tag - USA

programme.title: Superhero Tri: At Home Winter Wonderwheels
programme.desc: Clare Balding presents coverage of the event, as participants with disabilities teamed up with family and friends to take on a challenge from their homes, parks and neighbourhoods

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores Edinburgh and its role in the union between England and Scotland. She discovers how the famous case of Burke and Hare's bodysnatching influenced British medical law, and visits the Royal Bank of Scotland, where she uncovers evidence of the world's first overdraft. Plus, the role played by Henry Dundas, whose statue stands in St Andrew's Square, in the continuation of the slave trade

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Anthropologist Linda Shanson kicks off the competition in London by capitalising on her well-travelled past with a menu of 16 dishes from around the world. Her relaxed attitude soon causes her to fall behind schedule, and matters are not helped by one guest's perfectionist nature and another's allergy to prawns

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second meal takes place in London, with fishmonger Jonathan Norris preparing a main course of turbot. However, his inexperience in making desserts and lack of knowledge concerning wines threatens his chances of impressing the other competitors

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Opera singer Patricia Varley rustles up a retro repast of dinner-party dishes from the 1970s in the hope of persuading her guests that classics are better than nouvelle cuisine. The 70-year-old serenades the bemused group with I Could Have Danced All Night before the main course is put to the test

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent John Santamaria hosts the fourth party in London, and tries to impress his guests with a fillet of beef cooked to their individual tastes. However, nerves threaten to get the better of him when the big day arrives, and prior grievances with fellow contestants Jonathan Norris and Richard Whitaker make matters worse

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Architect, surveyor and property developer Richard Whitaker hosts the final meal in London, convinced his restaurant-style modern recipes will put all the other contestants in the shade. However, his obsession with tidiness threatens to overshadow his culinary efforts

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Birmingham pair Derek Hansel and Gina Awoko are looking for a home in Almeria, Spain, that they can eventually retire to and also generate some rental income from. Jasmine Harman shows them a range of properties within their £300,000 budget, from a coastal renovation project to an inland cortijo. However, it remains to be seen whether she can deliver the perfect property in the perfect location

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps house hunters find their dream homes in popular sunny European locations. Potential buyers explore the Croatian island of Hvar

programme.desc: The language barrier almost gets Johnny and Ashley into trouble as they go shopping for antiques. In Normandy, new owners Anna and Philipp see if their ancient well can be of use

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, agents Matt and Garry chase £1,700 owed by an accountant to a client, and officers Max and Paul try to recover almost £30,000 in north west London owed in rent arrears by a dentist after he was barred from working. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Teorin and Collette had high hopes when they let out their five-bedroom family home, but it wasn't long before their tenant stopped paying rent - and then turned the house into a hostel for holiday-makers. Quickly running out of options, the couple turn to eviction specialist Chris Sharpe for help. Plus, Harrow council officers discover 40 people crammed into a potential deathtrap of a house, and a woman who relies on her rent for medical expenses tries to claw back some from her tenant

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: An east London landlord who trusted his property to a letting agency discovers the house is being advertised on a Romanian website - and strangers have moved in. A South Yorkshire single mum is owed £10,000 in back rent when her tenant disappears, and has to prove he has abandoned the property to get it back. Plus, west London housing officers investigate a tip-off about people living in dangerous conditions behind a row of shops

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Kent couple Rachel and Chris are pushed to the limit when their relationship with their tenant breaks down and she stops paying rent, leaving them more than £5,000 out of pocket. Now they need to get her out or they could lose the house. Elsewhere, a tenant uses scare tactics to keep his landlord off his back, and in Harrow, council housing officers investigate a residential property that has been turned into a brothel

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The tale of an elderly couple whose hopes of a peaceful retirement were ruined when their tenants stopped paying rent, then moved in their abusive friends who became squatters. With the house becoming a free-for-all and in a terrible state of repair, and the couple facing a barrage of verbal threats and abusive behaviour, they have been forced to seek help in an attempt to get their property back. Plus, a man who cannot sell his house because his sitting tenant refuses to leave

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: In Bristol, eviction lawyer Chris deals with a complex case in which squatters have broken into an empty pub and are now refusing to leave, with landlord Alex wanting them out as he is awaiting planning permission to turn the pub into flats. programme.desc: Will is reluctantly dragged along with Grace and her new boyfriend Leo for a cycle ride in search of Hallowe'en pumpkins. Meanwhile, Jack and Karen attend a therapy session designed to 'cure' gay men and women

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will has cause to rue the day his firm's long-absent senior partner returns. Meanwhile, Karen ends up living in her limo after becoming estranged from Stan. Guest starring Gene Wilder

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Rose tells Charlie he is unable to sustain a lasting relationship with a woman because of his attitude to his mother, and Jake seeks advice about a girl at school. Starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones

programme.desc: Charlie wakes up with Rose the night after her birthday party. Her irate father is quickly on the scene demanding to know what the future holds for the couple, but is interrupted when Evelyn unexpectedly shows up. Starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones, with guest star Martin Sheen

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Close friends Janet Perrie and Fiona Hope moved to the South Ayrshire village of Dipple in search of an idyllic new life for themselves and their 22 dogs. Unfortunately for them, other residents were enraged by the noise, smell and mess and wasted no time in contacting the authorities. In a cul-de-sac in Leicestershire, the Pollard, Walne and Elliott families have been harassed by 68-year-old Leslie Collins for more than a decade after they complained about the noise from an illegal wood-waste business he was running from his home. He then began to target them with increasingly intimidating behaviour - including mooning, two-finger salutes, shouting abuse, cutting holes in hedges and spying on them with binoculars

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre feuds between neighbours. Including an Army veteran who was attacked with a knife, and a Polish couple forced to call the police after their neighbour threw petrol over one of them and threatened to burn down their conservatory

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, Del and Dael Anglin receive a hostile reception from the brother of a debtor who has alreasy defaulted on a promise to pay £2,000 she owes to a storage company. In Worcestershire, Gareth and Craig try to recover £45,000 from a young online entrepreneur, who claims no responsibility for the debt he owes to his courier. Their target cooks up a flimsy lie in an effort to absolve himself, but dishonesty proves to be the least of the agents' worries when they discover a stash of guns at the back of the garage. In east London, an Indian restaurant owner begins to take his financial responsibilities seriously when Del and Dael start removing cookers and freezers from his premises, and a pair of pensioners in Oxfordshire hope the High Court will provide them a lifeline as they try to pay off a £4,000 bill to a solicitors' firm after a failed compensation claim

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Craig investigate a possible case of mistaken identity in Shropshire, then in south Wales find themselves embroiled in a bitter dispute between two dog owners over a vet's bill. Steve and Phil have to evict a distraught young family from a former high street bank in west London, before paying a call on an elderly tailor in north London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents face a raft of excuses and stalling tactics as they try to recover £3,000 from a young debtor in Manchester, and a Kent businessman tries to protect his company from his ex-wife by claiming that it belongs to his sister. A Staffordshire optician who owes money to a supplier claims that the equipment he was sold was faulty, while enforcement agents in north London are forced to mediate between a tenant who claims she is being evicted for having children and a landlord who says she wanted to leave in the hope of getting a council house

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Experienced enforcement agent Stewart and trainee Iain head to Blackpool to chase down a builder owing nearly £3,500 to an unhappy customer, while father and son Del and Dael are in Essex to collect over £2,500 owed to a frozen food company. In south London, Del and Brian attempt to recover nearly £10,000 from a debtor who acted as guarantor for a friend's rental agreement, ending in a bizarre stand-off with the debtor's daughter

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Hayley rushes to help two badly injured motorcyclists, while Ross and John haul in a drink-driver who has left a trail of destruction in his wake. Duncan has to escort a 176-wheel monster truck through Workington, Steve deals with a boy racer, Tom goes undercover on the trail of some suspected bike thieves, and Duggie plays gooseberry on a couple's first date

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A violent man gives officers the runaround after wreaking havoc in a hospital, a Macedonian truck driver has a bad day and a fuel thief is caught red-handed. Meanwhile, two Audi S3s are put through their paces by the team and the Operational Support Unit goes back to the classroom for a course about dealing with riots

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Sergeant Baxter strikes it lucky when a routine check on a car uncovers a case of suspected drug dealing, and things turn nasty when three men are arrested on suspicion of theft. Elsewhere, Jon Peacock brings in two prisoners, a petrol thief's stealing spree comes to a halt after a high-speed pursuit, and Jules and Jezz come to the aid of an abandoned dog in a ditch

programme.title: Craziest Christmas Lights
programme.desc: Noddy Holder narrates this documentary following the extensive festive illuminations of various households. In Bristol, builder brothers Lee and Paul take over their childhood home to put on one of the West Country's biggest extravaganzas - something they have been doing now for 25 years. Hertfordshire man Dave has been at it even longer, having been transforming his semi-detached home since 1974, and getting celebrities such as Brian Conley and Danny Dyer to switch on his lights

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the inner workings of the supermarket during the festive period, revealing the secrets of the retailer's success, and how it rose from a grocery chain that once baffled its UK customers, to a brand that took almost one billion pounds in December 2018, enjoying its busiest week to date. The programme also follows the retailer from its arrival in Britain in the 1990s, through changing times and changing tastes to become the brand it is today, and reveals how the discounter came to fill television screens at Christmas, taking on the big name brand adverts with their own festive versions

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams and inspectors out to nail the litter louts and the fearless sewage warriors clearing the mess

programme.title: Feeders
programme.desc: Part two of two. In Tampa, Florida, cameras focus on 32-stone Leighton and her flatmate Ivy, who weighs in at 41 stone. Plus, on the West Coast, we meet 34-stone Caiti Dee

programme.title: Adults Only

programme.title: Britain's Poshest Brothel
programme.desc: The experiences of sex workers based at the Chelsea Cloisters apartment block, including Sienna, who works as a 'sexuality practitioner', offering tantric massage sessions

programme.title: Wentworth Prison
programme.desc: Ann announces the closure of the Protection Unit, forcing Will and Vera into preservation mode, while Allie refuses to guarantee Marie's safety, leaving the prison on a knife edge

programme.title: Wentworth Prison
programme.desc: Judy sabotages an important presentation for Ann and incurs her wrath, but secures confidential information for Ruby, while Allie is left to contend with a dangerous Lou Kelly

programme.title: Empire

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: An embarrassing situation arises when Leo omits to tell Grace she is having brunch with his parents, denying her the time to make a good impression. Jack is confronted by his acting tutor Zandra, and Will joins Karen for a Botox session. Guest starring Harry Connick Jr and Tom Skerritt

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Part one of two. Leo and Grace impetuously get married in Central Park at a wedding that turns out to be part of a ratings stunt for a TV show, and Will is hurt when he does not receive an invitation. Guest starring Harry Connick Jr and Debbie Reynolds, with Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Part two of two. When Grace realises she really does love Leo, she takes her vows again in a full traditional ceremony, but Will feels he is losing his best friend. Comedy, starring Eric McCormack, Debra Messing and Harry Connick Jr

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie becomes infatuated with a ballet teacher, but finds to his dismay that he has a rival for her affections in the form of an equally smitten Jake. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: One of Charlie's elderly neighbours becomes attracted to Alan, and Charlie tries to prevent Jake giving money to a TV evangelist. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen and Jon Cryer. With guest star Cloris Leachman

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre feuds between neighbours. Including an Army veteran who was attacked with a knife, and a Polish couple forced to call the police after their neighbour threw petrol over one of them and threatened to burn down their conservatory

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Steve and David were once good friends, but are now embroiled in an ongoing dispute that started with a simple off-the-cuff remark and soon spiralled into an all-out war over the ownership of a hedge. Also featured is a man who sent some workmates round to the house of a former mayor to collect money for unpaid building work, but ended up on the wrong side of the law himself when she complained to the police about his behaviour

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents face a raft of excuses and stalling tactics as they try to recover £3,000 from a young debtor in Manchester, and a Kent businessman tries to protect his company from his ex-wife by claiming that it belongs to his sister. A Staffordshire optician who owes money to a supplier claims that the equipment he was sold was faulty, while enforcement agents in north London are forced to mediate between a tenant who claims she is being evicted for having children and a landlord who says she wanted to leave in the hope of getting a council house

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Experienced enforcement agent Stewart and trainee Iain head to Blackpool to chase down a builder owing nearly £3,500 to an unhappy customer, while father and son Del and Dael are in Essex to collect over £2,500 owed to a frozen food company. In south London, Del and Brian attempt to recover nearly £10,000 from a debtor who acted as guarantor for a friend's rental agreement, ending in a bizarre stand-off with the debtor's daughter

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben try to drill through the locks on a property to evict the residents, only to find to their surprise that the door has been modified with special reinforced metal. Delroy and Brian try to reclaim money a garage owes to a customer and are shocked by the condition of the vehicle in question, and a woman who has acted as guarantor for her sister's tenancy does not realise the extent of her responsibilities

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. Meanwhile, agents in Bristol try to recover over £10,000 owed by a plumbing business to a supplier, and emotions run high when they attempt to evict a tenant who pleads her innocence in west London

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team have their hands full when a raid reveals a crowbar-wielding suspect with a house full of drugs, a Taser and an offensive mouth

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Operational Support Unit has to evade a guard dog when carrying out a drugs raid on a farm, while a driver thinks he can pull a fast one by impersonating his brother. Barry finds himself dealing with an irate nightclubber, Craggy has an early morning encounter with a polecat and it is a case of deja vu for Dan as he deals with the same person twice in one shift

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Twenty officers descend on a hotel to arrest members of a criminal gang in their beds, Jon and Maya raid a cannabis farm, and Craggy and Phil catch a serial bacon snatcher. Three police cars and a helicopter take on a teenage van thief, Sgt Carlin stops a driver who has a gun hidden behind his seat, and Brian reduces a time-wasting motorist to a blubbering wreck

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Decluttering experts Caz and Tee set out to help Plymouth pensioner Arthur, whose two-bedroom flat is packed with piles of junk he cannot bear to throw away. A carpet of newspapers covers every inch of the floor and as a result, family and friends have stopped visiting. This might just be the duo's toughest assignment yet. Meanwhile, Khim Sim is getting married to her fiancé Jim, but first she must clear her hoard so he can move in, and in London, Mandi's passion for vintage clothes is out of control

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Officers in Huntingdon explain that they had a problem with regular drunken violence at weekends, but that CCTV is at the forefront of their initiative to turn things around. Nick Wallis also discovers how CCTV is helping Chester's local council and the police manage problems on Race Day

programme.title: About Time (2013)
programme.desc: A single man gets the chance to turn his unhappy life around when his father reveals that they both have the ability to travel through time and change their personal history. He uses his newfound talent to try to improve his love life and win the heart of an American woman he has fallen for. Romantic fantasy comedy, with Domhnall Gleeson, Rachel McAdams and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: About Time (2013)
programme.desc: A single man gets the chance to turn his unhappy life around when his father reveals that they both have the ability to travel through time and change their personal history. He uses his newfound talent to try to improve his love life and win the heart of an American woman he has fallen for. Romantic fantasy comedy, with Domhnall Gleeson, Rachel McAdams and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams aiming to clean up the country, including internet entrepreneur Martin, and his partner-in-grime Glen, who have had enough of the fly-tippers plaguing their beloved Hampshire countryside and have decided to fight back using all means at their disposal. In the North East, the Howdon Sewage Treatment plant not only cleans over 12,000 litres of waste water a second, but even manages to turn it into a gas used to heat homes across the region. But to do it, head honcho Tony has to make sure his plant remains blockage free under a constant assault from wet wipes, sanitary products, false teeth and even the occasional 20ft python

programme.title: Wentworth Prison
programme.desc: Rita sacrifices her one hope of exoneration in order to rescue Ruby, while Allie takes extreme measures to get Marie to talk, with the help of Boomer and Judy

programme.title: Wentworth Prison

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Homeless
programme.desc: Former ballet dancer Calum, 21, who lives a life of luxury, tries to survive on the streets of London, but it is not long before he wants out

programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.title: Columbo: Death Hits the Jackpot (1991)
programme.desc: A photographer going through a divorce asks his jeweller uncle to cash in his winning lottery ticket to prevent his wife from getting a share. Seizing the opportunity to keep the money, the greedy older man kills his nephew - but has reckoned without Columbo's intervention. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Rip Torn, Gary Kroeger and Jamie Rose

programme.title: Columbo: Sex and the Married Detective (1989)
programme.desc: A sex therapist tries to pin the blame for the murder of her unfaithful lover on her assistant, but the dishevelled detective is not convinced by the ruse and seeks to identify a mysterious woman in black who was spotted leaving the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Lindsay Crouse, Peter Jurasik and Julia Montgomery

programme.title: Columbo: Strange Bedfellows (1995)
programme.desc: A horse trainer outraged by his brother's gambling debts murders both him and the bookie he owes money to, then claims one killed the other. Columbo is not convinced by his story and goes in search of the truth, and finds help from an unlikely source when a Mob enforcer is sent to investigate the bookie's death. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Rod Steiger and George Wendt

programme.title: Columbo Undercover (1994)
programme.desc: The detective dons various disguises to investigate the deaths of two men who apparently killed each other, his only clue being a fragment of a black-and-white photograph, and comes to suspect the double murder has a connection to a $4million bank robbery. Drama, starring Peter Falk, Ed Begley Jr, Burt Young and Tyne Daly

programme.title: Columbo Goes to the Guillotine (1989)
programme.desc: The dishevelled detective investigates the suspicious death of a stage magician. All the evidence points toward suicide - but the sleuth is soon on the trail of an ex-convict who once conspired with the illusionist to steal military secrets. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Anthony Andrews and Karen Austin

programme.title: Columbo and the Murder of a Rock Star (1991)
programme.desc: The crafty detective pits his wits against a brilliant defence lawyer who has never lost a case. The attorney has murdered his rock star girlfriend to prevent her exposing his unethical courtroom tactics, and then framed her lover for the crime. Drama, starring Peter Falk, Little Richard, Dabney Coleman, Shera Danese, Cheryl Paris and Julian Stone

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in her apartment, her son, recently paroled after serving 15 years for murder, becomes the prime suspect. Goren and Eames meet the detective who investigated the earlier case and discover the man may have been wrongly convicted - revealing a complex cover-up that implicates the policeman himself. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A fire at the side of the road prompts Stabler to pull over and assist the emergency services. He is horrified to discover the murder of a man who was set on fire - and his daughter Maureen sees everything. Christopher Meloni and Erin Broderick star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates the beating and rape of an Afghan woman in Central Park. As it probes the violent and disturbing case, the victim's family turn their backs on her. Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman who claims she has been raped turns to the Unit for help, but the team cannot get enough evidence against the prime suspect and is forced to drop the case. However, another victim comes forward six months later with a similar story, making them believe they have made a terrible mistake. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson get mixed up in the murky world of politics after a coalition leader's gay son is found murdered on the roof of his apartment. The finger of suspicion points to a notorious rapist, who has just been released from prison on parole, but he insists he didn't commit the crime - so further DNA tests are used to shed light on the death. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.desc: Tensions are high between new partners Briscoe and Curtis as they investigate the murder of a wealthy student in a biker bar. The detectives discover the victim's father had offered him $10,000 to drop his hobby and his biker girlfriend. Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt star

programme.desc: The murder of an undercover narcotics agent during a drugs raid splits Kincaid and McCoy over whether or not to ask for the newly reinstated death penalty. Ultimately, District Attorney Schiff must make the call. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jill Hennessy

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An attorney is killed shortly after deciding to file a sexual harrassment claim against his employer, and when Briscoe and Curtis investigate further, they discover both the alleged harasser and his wife have excellent motives for murder

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A hard-partying model, with a cocaine habit goes missing, and when the team investigates, a basketball player, a limo driver and a nightclub owner are suspected of orchestrating her disappearance

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is shot in her sleep, and further investigation leads the detectives to a boy whose drug-addicted mother has placed him in the care of her dealer. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.desc: The team must ascertain whether the murder of a Navy officer, whose body was found on a rural road, was the result of a bar fight or because he knew too much about an attack on a fellow female officer. programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of photographer Martin Roe, who was due to testify at an army first lieutenant's court-martial after he captured a picture of what appeared to be a soldier killing an unarmed civilian. However, the photograph is leaked, and Roe is later found dead with a needle in his arm

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team investigates a heist on a train carrying weapons, while Pride spies on the mayor. Featuring a guest appearance by Sheryl Crow

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride thinks he has found a new link between Mayor Hamilton and the illegal activity in Clearwater when a Navy chaplain is murdered

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride spies on one of Hamilton's accomplices, but he is spotted, leading to a shoot out in a crowded street

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rapist Kenneth Cleary strikes again, and the detectives must race against the clock to ensure their efforts to catch the criminal succeed. However, the suspect's wife provides him with an airtight alibi, and Harper's obsession with the case puts the investigation in jeopardy

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the traumatic case of an abused seven-year-old girl, currently lying in a coma in hospital. As they learn more about her severely dysfunctional family, they come to the conclusion that any one of them could be responsible for her condition. Christopher Meloni stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a promiscuous millionaire, and soon discover he had a tangled private life, involving a string of lovers and an angry wife. A team of scheming, sultry Russian gold-diggers could hold essential clues to the killing. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A prominent judge who was famed for his support of women's rights is found dead in his car, and the ensuing murder investigation leads the detectives to discover he was not as squeaky clean as he had seemed - and was linked to a case of corruption on the parole board. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Adam witnesses a murder on a video chat website, and the team races to the victim's apartment, where a search reveals a significant clue - her laptop has gone missing. Inquiries eventually lead to a college professor who implicates the dead girl's boyfriend - and as the case unfolds, it emerges that the killer is lining up a second victim. Crime drama, starring AJ Buckley, Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A couple are attacked in their home, and while the male victim is found dead at the scene, Mac is able to question the severely injured wife, who identifies her own son as the assailant. However, a convicted drug dealer confesses to the crime, forcing the team to investigate his motives. Guest starring Marcos De la Cruz (Sons of Anarchy)

programme.desc: A string of stash house robberies prompts Voight to set a trap, hoping to lure the killers into making another appearance. They take the bait and blast their way in to his apparent stash house, but it transpires that the perpetrators are not all Mexican - In fact, one of them is very much homegrown. Jason Beghe stars

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: The team are contacted by a woman caught up in a destructive relationship who appears to be held against her will. Intelligence works to find a connection between her kidnapping and several bank robberies. Olinsky gets one step closer to standing trial for Bingham's murder

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An investigation into three murders in the offices of a magazine places the detectives in the middle of a fierce family feud, involving a protective matriarch, warring siblings and a corrupt judge. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives respond to a hold-up committed by a bloodthirsty team of robbers in ski-masks, and McCoy struggles to determine whether the teenage tearaway found with the criminals was an unwilling hostage or a active participant in the crimes

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis try to solve the murder of a college student whose death was depicted in graphic detail on the internet. However, the investigation grinds to a halt when they encounter a lawyer who is unwilling to reveal vital information about her client's past

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A college student is found dead, prompting the detective duo to search for a rapist on campus. However, a report from the medical examiner puts them on a different path, and they discover events may have gone down an even more sinister track

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A investigation into multiple homicides at a clothes shop leads to the arrest of a schizophrenic man, and his decision to represent himself in court provides McCoy with a formidable opponent

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baby is found dead in his cot, and reports indicate he was poisoned. All the evidence pins the blame on a British au pair employed by the parents, but she claims the infant's death was a result of the mother's negligence. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Director Vance charges DiNozzo with a special assignment to go to France, locate Admiral Kendall's wayward daughter Amanda and bring her home. Arriving in Marseille, Tony immediately heads to the local NCIS office, only to find five dead agents. After eventually tracking down Amanda, the pair embark on a rollercoaster ride to the relative safety of the nearest NCIS office in Spain. Michael Weatherly stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs travels to his home town after hearing news of his father's death, while the team investigates whether a fire on a US Navy ship was accidental or planned. The vessel served as prison to several members of the Brotherhood of Doubt terrorist group, whom Gibbs was responsible for catching. After the blaze, two of those members are missing. Tony argues that Gibbs would want to know, but Vance does not want him disturbed at this difficult time. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team is unable to trust anyone in the city, so turn to the FBI for help in foiling the mayor's sinister scheme

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team flies to Israel, but receives a hostile reception from Ziva's father, who is the head of intelligence agency Mossad. As events unfold, Gibbs learns that Ziva was romantically involved with Rivkin and finds himself forced to make a tough decision. Guest starring Michael Nouri, alongside Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: When the daughter of a recently deceased senator is found murdered, Goren and Eames uncover a few startling facts about the family - the dead woman had tried to have her father cryonically frozen, her brother is not really the senator's son, and before cremation the old man's brain was stolen. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A boy is accused of killing one of his classmates, and Cabot feels she has no choice but to put the suspect in the temporary care of psychiatric evaluators. However, Munch and Cragen's investigation uncovers the seedy truth behind a drugs ring which uses children as pawns. Drama, starring Dann Florek and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team is called in when a psychologist is found murdered outside a convenience store and all the evidence points to one of her patients - a disturbed man who refuses to take his medication. However, the discovery of a second, surviving victim behind the shop blows the lid off its theory

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cragen is assigned to a five-year-old case on which the statute of limitations has nearly expired. The investigation relates to crimes committed by a serial rapist, and he must persuade the victims to talk before it is too late. Hard-hitting drama, starring Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team joins forces with detectives from the 47th Precinct to investigate the murder of a suspected sex offender, and Cragen becomes convinced witness and wealthy heiress Stephanie Mulroney is involved in the crime. When the real killer gives himself up, the Mulroney family demand an apology - but the clan may not be as innocent as they seem

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The head of a notorious Puerto Rican gang is found dead outside a hotel shortly after his predecessor is released from jail. Mac is forced to use his diplomatic skills to prevent a revenge attack - but a second death and an ambush on a police car lead him to believe the killer is a disgruntled insider. Drama, starring Gary Sinise, with Edward James Olmos (Battlestar Galactica, Blade Runner)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Armed robbers break into the apartment of lawyer Roland Carson and make off in a helicopter with jewels worth more than $5million. The detectives investigate and, as people who have come into contact with the gems start to turn up dead, they suspect Carson could have staged the whole affair and killed his accomplices to cover his tracks. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: Michelle Ackerley takes over presenting duties as buyers search for coastal properties, beginning with award-winning children's author Sally Gardner

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: Bristol residents David and Mina plan a move to Cornwall to escape the rat race and free up more time for leisure activities. Presenter Catherine Gee is on hand to help them spend their £500,000 budget, but the couple's extensive requirements make the ideal property difficult to find

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: A mother and daughter search for a cosy hideaway in Portugal where they can escape the pressure of life in the UK. Catherine Gee presents

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Chris and Sherrine Kingsley-Smith have spent most of their 14-year marriage travelling the world on a boat but are now ready to drop anchor for dry land. Chris is keen on the rural lifestyle of the Cotswolds, where they have friends, but Sherrine has her heart set on the Dordogne region of France, where they're currently renting. Jonnie Irwin shows them places in the UK for their budget of £700,000, while Jasmine Harman tempts them with some amazing properties in France for up to £900,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Syd and Caroline Keenan from Cheshire want to buy a holiday home for their family but can't decide whether it should be in Wales's Llyn Peninsula, where Caroline has strong family connections, or Sesimbra in Portugal: a place Syd loves for its culture, cuisine and climate. Jonnie Irwin shows them fantastic properties in Wales, while Jasmine Harman has great homes in Portugal for Syd and Caroline's budget of £250,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Nick and Natalie Hammond are selling their family home in Hertfordshire and want to buy somewhere near the coast with more outdoor space for their four children. Nick's keen on a move to Majorca, having holidayed in Spain as a child, but Natalie would prefer to move to Cornwall. They have a cash budget of £275,000 if they buy in Majorca where Laura Hamilton is on hand to help, or £375,000 if they buy in Cornwall, where Jonnie Irwin tries to beat Laura's properties

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Ceri and Mike Green choose between the Lake District and the French Alps, with Jonnie Irwin showing them three UK properties and Laura Hamilton choosing a trio across the Channel

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Teenage sweethearts Laura and Stuart Queen have lived in the same house in Carlisle for 16 years but now want a change of location and lifestyle. Stuart wants to move to central Scotland, close to family and work. Horse-lover Laura thinks they'll get more property and land in Murcia in Spain. Jonnie Irwin tries to please them both with a budget of £150,000 in central Scotland and Laura Hamilton tempts them with properties in Spain for a budget of £120,000

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell scour the antiques shops around Sheffield to find something that will give them the edge at the auction. Natasha goes out of her comfort zone when considering some 18th-century pottery, but feels more at home when she spots something from the 1970s. Philip opts for some typically 'Serrell' items, as well as chewing over more prehistoric stuff. He also goes out of his way to prove that chivalry isn't dead. On the road, Philip visits a factory using the world-famous Sheffield steel to make some very fine tools, and Natasha heads to the woods for a spot of foraging and some free food. It's going to be a nail biter at their final auction at Lytham St Annes, Lancashire

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Nick Knowles and the team attempt to build a two storey flexible use centre, which can be used by the local community however it decides. programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies
programme.desc: The doctors are in Magaluf to see what a week of heavy drinking has done to the boys' sperm and capacity for erections. Dawn Harper meets a family of two sisters and a cousin who all carry the BRCA1 breast cancer gene and follows their emotional journey to discover how it has affected their bodies, as well as the decisions they make to change their lives. Pixie McKenna helps a man with a serious dimple and uses new technology to face her fear of spiders, and the truck heads to the Midlands, where one man reveals a penis problem

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda becomes concerned about Aiden when the Book of Changes turns up in his classroom. Drama, starring Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: The wizard has an unexpected meeting with mysterious old sorcerer Taliesin, who takes him to the crystal cave and shows him a glimpse of the future. However, the gift turns out to be more of a curse when Merlin sees Morgana preparing to kill Uther and realises he faces the dangerous task of trying to change the course of destiny. Magical adventure series, starring Colin Morgan

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole
programme.desc: In 1992, 15-year-old Bobby Gonzalez got life for shooting his girlfriend's parents while they slept. More than 25 years later, he hopes to appeal his sentence

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A profile of former aspiring model Tracie Andrews, who stabbed her fiance 42 times in 1996 and then blamed the attack on a fictional road rage assailant

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: A samurai sword attack, the abduction of a dog, a group of vandals, and a domestic dispute give police plenty to deal with in Northumbria

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Focusing on the work of the City of London police as they tackle crime on the streets of the capital

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Members of the Road Crime Unit chase a drug dealer on the M5, and the Tactical Aid group prepares for a raid to confiscate illegal substances. Meanwhile, dog handler Daryl and his German shepherd Murphy are on the trail of the drivers of a stolen car that crashed in Exeter

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story of Scott Campbell who, despite seeing his father jailed in China for drug smuggling, decided to complete his unfinished mission to pay for a lawyer

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Following Australia's traffic enforcers as they deal with high-speed chases, defiant hooligans and explosive crashes

programme.title: Highway Patrol

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Following the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders.

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: A traveller is suspected of drug smuggling and an immigrant is arrested for working illegally. Plus, a man tries to hide bark and duck eggs from customs officials

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: A Korean woman encounters trouble when frog fat and beef lollies are found in her luggage. Plus, customs officials suspect a businessman's brand named goods are counterfeit

programme.title: The Listening Post
programme.desc: News. What is being reported by world media and how? Richard Gizbert guides you through the global news maze

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: For the first time in its long history, the famously discreet luxury hotel in Mayfair, central London, opens its doors to documentary cameras, with director Jane Treays spending a year behind the scenes following staff and guests. The Melchors from California arrive for their annual two-week stay, rekindling their relationship with personal butler Michael Lynch, while energetic general manager Thomas Kochs travels to New York to drum up new business from leading US travel agents

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: We Dive at Dawn (1943)
programme.desc: A British submarine crew is unexpectedly ordered to carry out a top-secret mission to sink the German fleet's latest battleship in the Baltic Sea. But it is not long before disaster strikes and the vessel becomes stranded in the middle of the ocean with no fuel or food. Second World War adventure, starring John Mills, Eric Portman, Reginald Purdell and Niall MacGinnis

programme.title: Victim (1961)
programme.desc: A secretly gay barrister discovers his lover has been driven to suicide by blackmailers, who have also extorted money from several other men. Risking his reputation and marriage, he hunts down the culprits, fully aware that it could lead to his own exposure as a homosexual, illegal at the time. Drama, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylvia Syms, Dennis Price and Anthony Nicholls

programme.title: Brief Encounter (1974)
programme.desc: Two married strangers meet by chance in a railway station waiting room, and their paths later cross many times until the pair become friends and their meetings a fixed arrangement. But as their feelings for each other transform from friendship into passion, both come to realise the affair is doomed to fail. Remake of David Lean's 1948 classic, starring Richard Burton and Sophia Loren

programme.title: The Boy Who Thought He Could Fly ()
programme.desc: A young boy grieving the loss of his mother convinces himself he can fly

programme.title: Killing Hitler
programme.desc: Conclusion of the investigation into Operation Foxley - the 1944 plan to assassinate Adolf Hitler - blending documentary, dramatic reconstruction and expert military analysis to bring to life the blueprint of the audacious plot. Featuring testimonies from members of Churchill's Special Operations Executive and one of the Fuhrer's most trusted bodyguards

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: Author and entrepreneur Michael Hayman interviews the business leaders at the heart of London's most exciting success stories

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Lancaster to find out how much air pollution a typical family breathes in and whether trees could be the answer to the problem. Chris van Tulleken explores the world of probiotics, Gabriel Weston examines a novel cure for migraines that was discovered by chance in a beauty clinic, and Saleyha Ahsan demonstrates how to revive a victim of drowning

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: The Second World War saw men from all classes unite to fight the Nazis, and this programme meets some of the last surviving pilots of the Battle of Britain. Women, who had been excluded from many jobs, worked in everything from anti-aircraft gun batteries to steel-making factories. The Blitz saw rescue workers risk all to save those trapped in bombed buildings. For many of the era's last survivors, the defiant spirit that brought the nation together remains one of their proudest moments, as this documentary reveals

programme.title: St Paul's
programme.desc: Part two. The Dean and Chapter are forced to consider increasing admission cost to help maintain the building

programme.title: The Harder They Come (1973)
programme.desc: A naive young man from rural Jamaica heads for Kingston in search of reggae stardom, only to get involved in the shady world of drug dealing as his musical career takes off. With no other option but to go on the run, he fights back against the system which forced him into a life of crime and becomes a political hero in the process. Crime drama, starring Jimmy Cliff, Janet Barkley, Carl Bradshaw and Bob Charlton

programme.title: Kidnapping Freddy Heineken (2015)
programme.desc: Five men struggling to make ends meet decide to kidnap a beer tycoon who is one of Europe's richest men. The plan is a success, and they demand the biggest ransom in history - but tensions within the group threaten their chances of escaping the law. Fact-based crime drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Jim Sturgess and Sam Worthington

programme.title: Reaper (2014)
programme.desc: A death row inmate is sent to the electric chair, but the execution goes wrong and transforms him into a deadly supernatural creature that destroys everything in its path. He sets out to slaughter a group of criminals lying low in a hotel, but a hitch-hiker organises the crooks to fight back. Horror, starring Danny Trejo and Vinnie Jones

programme.title: True Blue Confessions
programme.desc: A tribute to Mary Millington, Britain's number one sex symbol of the 1970s

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist is joined by fellow musicians for an impromptu jam session, as well as a chat about their lives in rock. In this edition he is joined by Alice Cooper

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Lancaster to find out how much air pollution a typical family breathes in and whether trees could be the answer to the problem. Chris van Tulleken explores the world of probiotics, Gabriel Weston examines a novel cure for migraines that was discovered by chance in a beauty clinic, and Saleyha Ahsan demonstrates how to revive a victim of drowning

programme.title: St Paul's
programme.desc: Part two. The Dean and Chapter are forced to consider increasing admission cost to help maintain the building

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Tjure's hammer is struck by lightning and gets stuck in a stone in between Flake and a neighbouring village - but both communities claim this is a blessing from the thunder god

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Ylvi is captured by the pirates and forced to work as a maid on their ship - but she causes her captors no end of trouble

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls meet a yeti when they break down in the Himalayas, and the creature helps them to find their missing friend

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls perform at a billionaire's birthday party, but end up breaking off the concert to find his missing cat

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: A PR coach convinces the girls they will be more popular if they adopt a goth image - but their gloomy new look has the opposite effect

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls shoot a music video on a tropical island, but their presence angers a volcano god, who demands a human sacrifice

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist is joined by Stereophonics frontman Kelly Jones, who discusses some of his favourite songs, including Otis Redding's Cigarettes and Coffee and Who Killed Davey Moore? by Bob Dylan

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: The Second World War saw men from all classes unite to fight the Nazis, and this programme meets some of the last surviving pilots of the Battle of Britain. Women, who had been excluded from many jobs, worked in everything from anti-aircraft gun batteries to steel-making factories. The Blitz saw rescue workers risk all to save those trapped in bombed buildings. For many of the era's last survivors, the defiant spirit that brought the nation together remains one of their proudest moments, as this documentary reveals

programme.title: St Paul's
programme.desc: Part two. The Dean and Chapter are forced to consider increasing admission cost to help maintain the building

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Regular guest Alexander, Crown Prince of Yugoslavia, returns to stay in the suite in which he was born in 1945. There are also visits by actress Joan Collins, writer and comedian Stephen Fry and the Emperor of Japan, as well as 85-year-old former bookmaker Gerry Parker, who has breakfasted at Claridge's for the past 40 years. General manager Thomas Kochs takes any change very seriously and oversees every decision necessary - from new alarm clocks to a £10million renovation plan

programme.title: Assassin for Hire (1951)
programme.desc: An assassin who kills to finance his violinist brother's career is tricked into confessing his crimes by a wily police inspector. Drama, starring Sydney Tafler, Ronald Howard, Katherine Blake and John Hewer

programme.title: The Slipper and the Rose (1976)
programme.desc: A girl is reduced to being the downtrodden servant of her cruel stepmother after her father's death. With a little help from her fairy godmother, she wins the heart of a handsome prince, who is desperately trying to avoid being forced into a political marriage by his parents. Musical version of Cinderella, starring Gemma Craven and Richard Chamberlain

programme.title: This Is London
programme.desc: Take a tour of London through some of the city's most exciting, trendiest businesses and products, featuring ads from Elan Cafe, Cityspace, The Oblique Life and more

programme.title: Earth Cycle
programme.desc: Simon Parker charts the seasonal cycles of the natural world as he journeys through Scandinavia on a bicycle, wild camping, seeing animal migrations and sampling local food

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Medical journalist Michael Mosley and a team of doctors offer advice on health, using their expertise and the latest research to investigate the truth behind various claims about well-being made in the media

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Jimmy allows the kids to throw a party while he takes his disapproving mother-in-law out to dinner to keep her away from the house. However, it soon becomes clear Diana has also been sneaking around behind everyone's backs. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst and Celia Imrie

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Dewyne Lindsay visits the district of Thamesmead, which is 11 miles from Charing Cross on the South Bank of the River Thames.

programme.title: Once a Soldier
programme.desc: Open for over 300 years and home to 320 old soldiers, the Royal Hospital in Chelsea is under threat. This series follows the exceptional men for a year of their lives

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien may have ulterior motives for inviting Tracey to a posh event, while Sharon makes a tidy profit out of fake Rolling Stones T-shirts. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Murder Investigation Team
programme.desc: The body of former glamour model Natasha McKay is washed up on a bank of the Thames and the team's investigations uncover a number of intriguing leads. Although married to a wealthy property tycoon, Natasha apparently felt the need to raise extra cash to fund her wild lifestyle _ and an e-mail correspondence with an old school friend may shed light on the mystery. Gary Kemp guests

programme.title: White Collar Boxing League
programme.desc: Fast-paced adrenaline-filled White Collar Boxing from The WBCL. Fighting talk, getting up close and personal to the competitors in and out of the ring

programme.title: Hound (2017)
programme.desc: An alcoholic loner is snapped out of his misery when his faithful dog is murdered by a local gangster. Overcoming his addiction, he transforms his life by mastering martial arts, then puts his skills to use seeking vengeance. Crime thriller, starring Sacharissa Claxton and Neal Ward

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: Two sisters are expelled from a nunnery and are plunged into a life of debauchery. While one embraces her new lifestyle, the other is desperate to cling to her old morality and sees a hope of salvation in a mysterious aristocrat who harbours a hidden dark side. Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.title: Deceitful Love (2016)
programme.desc: The lives of a wealthy British Indian family are turned upside down when dark family secrets are made public after a family bereavement. Drama, starring Indiraa and Gurdial Sira

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring Canary Wharf and Southbank.

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Medical journalist Michael Mosley and a team of doctors offer advice on health, using their expertise and the latest research to investigate the truth behind various claims about well-being made in the media

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Sven and Halvar work together to escape from a giant and steal his treasure - but the pirate captain tries to take all the loot for himself

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The crew explores a tunnel full of traps - and Ulme's musical talents may be the key to everyone getting out in one piece

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls try to find a movie star's lost Chihuahuas while a storm is brewing

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls try to rescue Captain Sloop with the aid of a champion skateboarder - but X fears they are heading into a trap

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: Kylie's favourite teddy bear is stolen, and a mysterious phone call makes demands for its safe return

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls have to babysit Maxine's nephew - who ends up wandering off in a spooky castle where a monster is rumoured to live

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Producer Mark Ronson compares notes with Ronnie about their varied approaches to the recording process, and the pair also discuss artists including Amy Winehouse and Stevie Wonder

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Jimmy allows the kids to throw a party while he takes his disapproving mother-in-law out to dinner to keep her away from the house. However, it soon becomes clear Diana has also been sneaking around behind everyone's backs. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst and Celia Imrie

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Dewyne Lindsay visits the district of Thamesmead, which is 11 miles from Charing Cross on the South Bank of the River Thames.

programme.title: Once a Soldier
programme.desc: Open for over 300 years and home to 320 old soldiers, the Royal Hospital in Chelsea is under threat. This series follows the exceptional men for a year of their lives

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien may have ulterior motives for inviting Tracey to a posh event, while Sharon makes a tidy profit out of fake Rolling Stones T-shirts. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: Two teenage shoplifters are caught by the police, and cricketer Andrew Flintoff receives the honour of officially opening a new store, but there is a race to get the publicity photos to the papers on time. Meanwhile, people use a roof top to make urban honey, and a woman is injured

programme.title: The Lady with the Lamp (1951)
programme.desc: Biopic of Florence Nightingale, who went down in medical history for her heroic efforts to treat thousands of casualties during the Crimean War, while the British Government belittled her for being a woman. Starring Anna Neagle and Michael Wilding

programme.title: Time Without Pity (1957)
programme.desc: An alcoholic writer returns home after years living abroad when he learns his estranged son has been convicted of murder and sentenced to hang. Although his attempts at reconciliation are rejected, he spends the last 24 hours before the execution trying to prove his son is innocent by identifying the real killer. Mystery, starring Michael Redgrave, Ann Todd, Leo McKern and Peter Cushing

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Jimmy allows the kids to throw a party while he takes his disapproving mother-in-law out to dinner to keep her away from the house. However, it soon becomes clear Diana has also been sneaking around behind everyone's backs. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst and Celia Imrie

programme.title: Drive My Car
programme.desc: Short film parodying 1970s car adverts

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. The pair discover they share a dislike of being fixed up, so depart together to prevent Helen objecting to them leaving. Bob Larbey's comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen and Phil are keen to know how things went between unlikely lovebirds Laura and Mike, so both end up invited to lunch - where they relate conflicting stories. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: Filthy Cities
programme.desc: Dan Snow heads for 18th-century Paris to discover how the insanitary living conditions endured by its poorest residents helped bring about the French Revolution. He visits a perfumer to re-create some of the city's unsavoury smells, and finds out what happened to the thousands of bodies that overflowed from cemeteries during the Terror of 1793. He also tries his hand at tanning leather the traditional way - using dog faeces and urine

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: The chef takes a trip down memory lane as she relives her youthful love for ice-cream, before making a strudel - one of her family's favourite dishes

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey spreads her wings for the first time since her husband was put behind bars, and invites a handsome footballer round for dinner. Meanwhile, Sharon discovers the joys of literature. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: The Pink House (2017)
programme.desc: Documentary about a brothel in Australia's gold rush region that has been running for decades under the watchful eye of its now 70-year-old madam

programme.title: The Harder They Come (1973)
programme.desc: A naive young man from rural Jamaica heads for Kingston in search of reggae stardom, only to get involved in the shady world of drug dealing as his musical career takes off. With no other option but to go on the run, he fights back against the system which forced him into a life of crime and becomes a political hero in the process. Crime drama, starring Jimmy Cliff, Janet Barkley, Carl Bradshaw and Bob Charlton

programme.title: Black Gunn (1972)
programme.desc: A member of a black militant group carries out a robbery on a crime syndicate that ends in several deaths. When he is later murdered by the gangsters, his nightclub owner brother swears revenge. Crime thriller, starring Jim Brown and Martin Landau

programme.title: Kidnapping Freddy Heineken (2015)
programme.desc: Five men struggling to make ends meet decide to kidnap a beer tycoon who is one of Europe's richest men. The plan is a success, and they demand the biggest ransom in history - but tensions within the group threaten their chances of escaping the law. Fact-based crime drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Jim Sturgess and Sam Worthington

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for the chance to compete for a cash prize. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman

programme.title: Sporting Heroes
programme.desc: Part one of an interview with the former rugby union star, who toured with the British & Irish Lions on three occasions, and twice served as the captain of the team

programme.title: Sporting Heroes
programme.desc: Part two of an interview with the former rugby union star, who toured with the British & Irish Lions on three occasions, and twice served as the captain of the team

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Extended highlights of the First Test at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane, as the 2013 three-match series got under way. The tourists had already played here against Queensland Reds and will have been aware of the need to start strongly against the injury-hit Wallabies. Lions coach Warren Gatland has a strong squad to select from and was looking to begin in the same fashion as the 2001 vintage, who won in Brisbane in the opening Test of that tour

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the Second Test at the Etihad Stadium in Melbourne, as the Lions aimed to clinch the 2013 series after winning a thrilling First Test 23-21. The Lions suffered their heaviest defeat on this ground during the 2001 tour, as the Aussies overturned a half-time deficit to run away 35-14 victors. With just one Test remaining, the result here will determine whether there is anything riding on next Saturday's final showdown

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the third and final Test at the ANZ Stadium in Sydney, as the 2013 tour reached its conclusion. The opening two Tests were both decided by the narrowest of margins - the Lions prevailed 23-21 in the opener in Brisbane, as Australia missed a chance to win the match with the final kick of the game, before the Wallabies earned revenge by triumphing 16-15 in Melbourne, with the visitors failing to score from a last-gasp penalty attempt on that occasio

programme.title: How The 2007 ICC World Cup Was Won
programme.desc: A look back at the 2007 staging of the World Cup in the West Indies, a tournament that featured 51 matches in the Caribbean, with Australia starting as reigning champions. The established nations didn't have it their own way in the group stages, and a number of upsets throughout the tournament helped to ensure the drama increased until the showpiece occasion at the Kensington Oval in Barbados

programme.desc: Sri Lanka v India. Action from the final at the Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai, India, where the 10th world champions were crowned. After making it past rivals Pakistan in the semi-finals, pre-tournament favourites India were expected to triumph in their home country and claim their first World Cup since 1983, when they beat West Indies at Lord's. However, Sri Lanka claimed impressive victories over England and New Zealand in the knockout stage to progress to the final, and only suffered one defeat in the group stage

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Brentford v Yeovil Town. Action from the 2012/13 League One play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where the remaining place in the following season's Championship was decided. Brentford agonisingly missed out on automatic promotion on the final day of the regular campaign, but recovered to defeat Swindon Town on penalties in their semi-final, while Yeovil were 2-1 aggregate victors over Sheffield United

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football

programme.title: Live NFL
programme.desc: Cleveland Browns v Baltimore Ravens (Kick-off 1.15am). Coverage of the week 14 match at FirstEnergy Stadium, as the two teams from the AFC North battle it out for an important win. In the reverse fixture back in September the Ravens easily beat their rivals 38-6, taking their overall record against the Browns to 32-11. The home side scored 28 unanswered points in the final three quarters in what was both sides' first games of the season.

programme.title: Live NFL
programme.desc: Cleveland Browns v Baltimore Ravens (Kick-off 1.15am). Coverage of the week 14 match at FirstEnergy Stadium, as the two teams from the AFC North battle it out for an important win. In the reverse fixture back in September the Ravens easily beat their rivals 38-6, taking their overall record against the Browns to 32-11. The home side scored 28 unanswered points in the final three quarters in what was both sides' first games of the season.

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: The story of Denver Broncos' 1998 Super Bowl success over Atlanta Falcons at the Pro Player Stadium in Miami, Florida. Quarterback John Elway became the oldest player to be named Super Bowl MVP, as he led the Broncos to a 34-19 victory in the final game of his career
